purpose: Establish Studio → CLI handoff pattern for JS tasks

tasks.description: Multi-layer parallax with Intersection Observer + scroll-reveal
tasks.studio_chat_message: Add parallax scrolling where each section has a different scroll speed. The hero background should move at 0.3x scroll speed, the story section at 0.5x, and the activities section should have cards that fade in and slide up as you scroll to them.
tasks.studio_result: Studio can set background-attachment:fixed for CSS parallax (already implemented in our-story.html), but cannot write Intersection Observer JavaScript for per-element speed control or scroll-triggered reveal animations.
tasks.cli_action: Created sites/site-street-family-reunion/dist/assets/js/parallax.js with Intersection Observer scroll-reveal (data-animate) and background parallax shift via requestAnimationFrame (data-parallax-speed). Added data-parallax-speed='0.3' to our-story hero, data-animate='fade-up' to all activity cards and timeline items.
tasks.component_description: Multi-layer parallax with configurable speed and direction per section, plus scroll-reveal fade-up/fade-in animations via data attributes
tasks.suggested_studio_capability: Studio could inject data-animate and data-parallax-speed attributes when building sections, with parallax.js auto-included in the build pipeline for any site that uses these attributes

tasks.description: Auto-advancing crossfade slideshow with navigation dots, touch support, pause-on-hover
tasks.studio_chat_message: Create an animated photo gallery on the Gallery page. Photos should display in a creative collage layout that transitions between groups of photos with a crossfade effect. Include navigation dots.
tasks.studio_result: Studio generated static HTML slide structure with an inline changeSlide() function in gallery.html — basic click-to-advance worked but no auto-advance, no crossfade (display:none/block), no dots, no touch support, no pause-on-hover.
tasks.cli_action: Created assets/js/slideshow.js — full replacement for the inline script. Adds crossfade via CSS opacity transitions, auto-advance timer, dot navigation auto-injected after container, touch/swipe (40px threshold), pause-on-hover. Added data-slideshow to gallery container. Removed inline script from gallery.html.
tasks.component_description: Auto-advancing crossfade slideshow configurable via data attributes, with dot nav auto-injected, touch/swipe support, and pause-on-hover
tasks.suggested_studio_capability: Studio should emit data-slideshow on slideshow containers by default. The inline script pattern should be replaced with slideshow.js in the build pipeline for all sites.

tasks.description: Enhanced card hover: lift shadow, image scale, icon breaking past card border
tasks.studio_chat_message: Make the activity cards more dynamic. On hover, the card should lift with a shadow, the image should scale slightly, and the icon should break past the top border of the card — floating above it by about 20px.
tasks.studio_result: Studio CSS (activity-card in styles.css) already handles basic lift (translateY(-8px)) and shadow. Icon breakout via transform and overflow:visible requires JS-injected styles to override overflow constraints set at build time.
tasks.cli_action: Created assets/js/card-animations.js — injects styles for cubic-bezier lift, image scale, and icon breakout (data-card-icon transforms translateY(-24px) on card hover). Added data-card-enhanced to all 6 activity cards on index.html and heritage/values cards on our-story.html.
tasks.component_description: Icon breakout + cubic-bezier lift via data-card-enhanced and data-card-icon attributes
tasks.suggested_studio_capability: Studio should emit data-card-enhanced on cards by default, with card-animations.js in the build pipeline

tasks.description: Scroll-triggered count-up animation for family stats
tasks.studio_chat_message: Add animated number counters to the Our History page. When the user scrolls to the stats section, numbers should count up from zero to: '150+ Family Members', '6 Generations', '45 States', '1 United Family'. The counting animation should take 2 seconds.
tasks.studio_result: Studio cannot write Intersection Observer JavaScript. Studio could build the HTML structure (stat cards with numbers) but the numbers would be static.
tasks.cli_action: Created assets/js/counter-animation.js — Intersection Observer fires count-up on 50% visibility. Ease-out cubic easing for natural deceleration. Added a new Stats section to our-story.html with data-count-to, data-count-suffix, data-count-duration attributes on each counter span.
tasks.component_description: Scroll-triggered count-up with configurable target, suffix, prefix, duration via data attributes. Fires once per element.
tasks.suggested_studio_capability: Studio should output counter stat sections with data-count-to attributes. counter-animation.js added to build pipeline for any site with counter elements.

tasks.description: Smooth scroll for anchor links + scroll-to-top button
tasks.studio_chat_message: Add smooth scrolling when clicking navigation links that point to sections on the same page. Also add a scroll-to-top button that appears after scrolling down 300px.
tasks.studio_result: CSS scroll-behavior: smooth is achievable by Studio. The scroll-to-top button visibility toggle (show after 300px scroll) requires JS.
tasks.cli_action: Created assets/js/smooth-scroll.js — injects html{scroll-behavior:smooth}, handles anchor clicks with nav offset (80px for sticky nav), auto-creates scroll-to-top button if data-scroll-top element not present. Button fades in after 300px scroll using IntersectionObserver-free scroll listener with rAF throttle.
tasks.component_description: Smooth anchor scrolling with sticky nav offset + auto-created scroll-to-top button
tasks.suggested_studio_capability: Studio should include smooth-scroll.js in build pipeline by default for all multi-section sites

tasks.description: Image lazy loading with fade-in transition
tasks.studio_chat_message: Add lazy loading to all images on the site. When an image enters the viewport, it should fade in smoothly instead of popping in.
tasks.studio_result: Studio can emit loading='lazy' on images (native browser lazy loading). The fade-in effect on entry requires Intersection Observer + CSS transition.
tasks.cli_action: Created assets/js/lazy-load.js — adds .lazy-pending (opacity:0) on init, .lazy-loaded (opacity:1, triggers transition) when image enters viewport via IntersectionObserver with 100px rootMargin. Also supports data-src swap pattern. Added loading='lazy' data-lazy to book cover and all gallery images.
tasks.component_description: Utility script — too generic to be a named component, should be standard in build pipeline
tasks.suggested_studio_capability: Studio should emit data-lazy on all images by default. lazy-load.js added to build pipeline for all sites.

tasks.description: Regenerate home page hero with black family reunion image via Adobe Firefly
tasks.cli_action: BLOCKED: FIREFLY_CLIENT_ID and FIREFLY_CLIENT_SECRET not configured. Created scripts/firefly-batch-street-reunion.json with full prompts for hero_family_reunion.jpg (16:9 landscape, black family reunion) and firefly_gallery_reunion.jpg (intimate storytelling moment). Hero video poster updated to reference assets/images/hero_family_reunion.jpg with data-slot-status='firefly-pending' and data-firefly-prompt attribute. Run: firefly-generate --batch scripts/firefly-batch-street-reunion.json from ~/famtastic/ once credentials are set.
tasks.suggested_studio_capability: Studio should detect data-slot-status='firefly-pending' slots and trigger firefly-generate automatically when credentials are available

capability_gaps: Intersection Observer patterns (parallax, counter, lazy-load) — Studio cannot generate JS
State management for slideshow (auto-advance timer, touch tracking) — CLI only
Dynamic stylesheet injection for icon breakout effects — CLI only
Adobe Firefly image generation — blocked by missing credentials
summary.pattern_description: Studio → CLI handoff is clean and repeatable. Studio handles HTML structure + CSS classes + data attribute scaffolding. CLI writes all JavaScript. Playwright bridges the two by: (1) sending Studio chat messages, (2) detecting 'no JS output' responses, (3) triggering CLI, (4) refreshing preview, (5) logging results.
